title: tournefortia pedicellata
intro: Tournefortia pedicellata is a plant species commonly known as 'Biluoya' or 'Himalayan Tournefortia', native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to possess several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Tournefortia pedicellata is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
